headline: KPTI Stock Down on Mixed Phase III Myelofibrosis Combo Study Data
summary: Karyopharm Therapeutics stock sinks 18% after mixed phase III data show spleen benefit but no symptom edge for selinexor combo in myelofibrosis, raising questions on efficacy.

headline: UBS Maintains Neutral on Incyte, Lowers Price Target to $94
summary: UBS  analyst Ashwani Verma   maintains Incyte (NASDAQ:INCY) with a Neutral and lowers the price target from $104 to $94.

headline: HC Wainwright & Co. Reiterates Buy on Incyte, Maintains $135 Price Target

headline: A Look At Incyte (INCY) Valuation After Mixed Short Term Returns And Strong One Year Performance
summary: Incyte (INCY) is back on investors’ radar after recent share price moves, with the stock showing mixed short term performance and a strong 1 year total return that contrasts with weaker figures for the past month and past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Incyte. With the share price at $90.62, recent weakness is clear in the 30 day share price return of -10.56% and 90 day return of -9.78%, even as the 1 year total shareholder return of 45.97% signals earlier strength that investors are...
